name: rune
desc: Build multiplayer web games played by millions! 👾 You focus on your game, Rune handles everything else, incl. backend and networking 🚀 Make your game using J…
descFull: Build multiplayer web games played by millions! 👾 You focus on your game, Rune handles everything else, incl. backend and networking 🚀 Make your game using JavaScript / TypeScript and any frontend web framework such as React, Svelte, Vue, Threejs, PixiJS, Phaser. You can even use plain HTML and CSS. Perfect for web devs interested in gamedev.
